issues.title: Possible hardcoded secret detected
issues.description: The workflow appears to contain a hardcoded credential-like value.
issues.impact: Secrets stored in source control can be exposed and reused by attackers.
issues.remediation: Move secrets to GitHub Secrets or a secret manager and reference them securely.

issues.title: Missing explicit permissions block
issues.description: Workflow does not declare explicit GITHUB_TOKEN permissions.
issues.impact: Default permissions may be broader than necessary.
issues.remediation: Add an explicit `permissions` block with least privilege.

issues.title: Action not pinned to commit SHA
issues.description: Third-party action is pinned to a version tag instead of a commit SHA.
issues.impact: Tags can be moved, enabling malicious updates.
issues.remediation: Pin actions to a full commit SHA and review updates.

issues.title: Action not pinned to commit SHA
issues.description: Third-party action is pinned to a version tag instead of a commit SHA.
issues.impact: Tags can be moved, enabling malicious updates.
issues.remediation: Pin actions to a full commit SHA and review updates.

issues.title: Docker Compose image not pinned
issues.description: Compose service image uses no tag or `latest`.
issues.impact: Unreviewed image updates could be deployed.
issues.remediation: Pin images to a specific version or digest.
